description: Complete the helicopter certification report at ~/Documents/HeliSAR/pressure_baseline_report.txt using the briefing at ~/Desktop/h145_sar_certification.txt. Identify the correct climatological surface pressure dataset for May from ~/PanoplyData/, export a Panoply map of the Himalayan region to ~/Documents/HeliSAR/himalayan_surface_pressure_may.png, and record the ambient surface pressure near 28°N, 87°E. BE CAREFUL: using Sea Level Pressure for high-altitude aerodynamics is a catastrophic engineering error.
